archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with Tech-Forward Navy & Teal

gradients.hero_mesh: radial-gradient(circle at 15% 50%, rgba(26, 172, 139, 0.25), transparent 25%), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 30%, rgba(34, 201, 165, 0.25), transparent 25%)

motion_and_interactions.global: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations. Elements should stagger in with y: 20 and opacity: 0 to y: 0 and opacity: 1.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Cards should have subtle upward translation (-translate-y-1) and increased border opacity on hover.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use Framer Motion for auto-scrolling partner logos loop.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.design: Sticky, fixed top, z-50. Glassmorphism backdrop-blur. Nav links: About, Hospital, Corporate, Wellness, Plans, Team, Contact. Active link has a #1AAC8B underline. Hamburger menu for mobile.

sections.name: Hero
sections.design: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). CSS animated mesh gradient mixed with a dot-grid pattern overlay. Left side: Badge (small uppercase), large H1 heading, CTAs. Right side: Floating glassmorphism cards showcasing stats/features. Bottom: Animated counter stats.

sections.name: USP
sections.design: 4-column grid (or 2x2 on tablet, 1x4 on mobile). Use 'Solid Card' style with glowing hover effects.

sections.name: Hospital Management
sections.design: 2-column layout. Left: Feature list with icons. Right: `hospital_dashboard` mockup image with a subtle drop shadow.

sections.name: Corporate Solutions
sections.design: 6-card bento grid layout on `navy_dark` background. Mix column spans to create asymmetry.

sections.name: Fad 2 Fit Gamification
sections.design: Timeline visualization. Use `gamification_timeline` image alongside discount cards. Glowing timeline nodes.

sections.name: Subscription Plans
sections.design: Horizontal scroll section (or flex overflow-x-auto) featuring pricing plans. Highlight the 'Featured' card with a teal border and slight scale.

sections.name: Partner Network
sections.design: Auto-scrolling marquee containing partner logo images. Desaturated images with hover to color.

sections.name: Team
sections.design: Grid of leadership cards. Use `team_` images. Name and title below each image.

sections.name: Contact
sections.design: Glassmorphism form set against a deep gradient background. Includes form validation. Connect to backend API.

sections.name: Footer
sections.design: Large 'healthism+' logo. Multi-column links. Deep navy background.

hospital_dashboard.description: Mockup of the premium hospital dashboard

instructions_to_main_agent.stack: MERN Stack. Frontend: React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, React Router DOM. Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB (Mongoose).
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Include Syne and DM Sans from Google Fonts via CDN or NPM. Apply Syne to all headings and DM Sans to body.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Build custom Framer Motion components. Use purely custom HTML+Tailwind for the layouts to match the exact marketing page requirements.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.backend_integration: Set up a Mongoose schema for the Contact Form submissions. Create an Express POST route to handle saving the contact form data to MongoDB. Connect the frontend form to this backend API endpoint.
